commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=81a317a0ff60b78839234a574ed4976d1fd1bce5)
commands.review_summary:
The PR retries selected Codex app-server bridge failures before visible output or side effects, surfaces repeated failures, adds retry guard tests, and updates Android realtime/Talk to reuse visible `message` tool source replies from agent tool events.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced replay-safety bug: source inspection shows failed mutating tool results clear the pending blocker without latching a side-effect flag, then the app-server bridge catch path can retry. The original dropped Telegram and Android Talk symptoms are supported by PR context and tests but not live-reproduced in this review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action and maintainer review are needed because the PR has a narrow replay-safety blocker and missing real behavior proof that automation cannot supply for the contributor's live setup.

target.title: Preserve app-server and Android realtime replies
target.body:
## Summary
- Retry Codex app-server bridge client-close and turn-completion idle failures once when the run has not produced visible output, persisted the queued user message, sent through the message tool, or completed/started a mutating tool.
- Surface repeated or unsafe app-server bridge failures as visible Codex app-server errors so group/channel replies do not silently disappear behind generic runner suppression.
- Preserve Android realtime/Talk consult replies that are returned through the `message` tool by subscribing the Android operator to tool events and forwarding the cached `sourceReply.text` back to the realtime session.

## Root Cause
PR #83827 is still present upstream. The original observed drops match a different app-server lifecycle failure signature such as `codex app-server client closed before turn completed` or `codex app-server turn idle timed out waiting for turn/completed`; those failures were flowing through the generic before-reply failure path and could become silent in group/channel conversations.

The later Android Talk repro was another path again: the agent produced the visible answer inside the `message` tool result, while the Android realtime tool completion path only read the final assistant message. In that consult flow the final assistant message is `NO_REPLY`, so Android submitted empty text back to realtime and the spoken/visible answer disappeared.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: app-server client-close/turn-completion idle failures before reply no longer disappear silently; clean pre-output failures retry once; post-output/post-side-effect failures do not replay. Android realtime/Talk consults now preserve `message` tool `sourceReply.text` instead of completing the realtime tool call with empty `NO_REPLY` text.

Real environment tested: local tmp PR worktree, using the repo Vitest wrapper for the app-server path and Android Gradle unit/ktlint checks for the realtime/Talk path.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/reply-delivery.ts src/auto-reply/reply/reply-delivery.test.ts`; `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/reply-delivery.test.ts`; `ANDROID_HOME=/home/vac/android-sdk ./gradlew :app:testPlayDebugUnitTest --tests ai.openclaw.app.voice.ChatEventTextTest`; `ANDROID_HOME=/home/vac/android-sdk ./gradlew :app:testThirdPartyDebugUnitTest --tests ai.openclaw.app.voice.ChatEventTextTest`; `ANDROID_HOME=/home/vac/android-sdk ./gradlew :app:ktlintCheck`; `git diff --check -- apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/node/ConnectionManager.kt apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/voice/ChatEventText.kt apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/voice/TalkModeManager.kt apps/android/app/src/test/java/ai/openclaw/app/voice/ChatEventTextTest.kt`; `~/.codex/skills/codex-review/scripts/codex-review --mode local`.

Evidence after fix: oxfmt reported all matched TypeScript files use the correct format; `git diff --check` passed; Vitest reported `Test Files 2 passed (2)` and `Tests 131 passed (131)`; Android Play and ThirdParty `ChatEventTextTest` tasks both built successfully; Android `ktlintCheck` built successfully after one local formatting fix.

Observed result after fix: app-server bridge failures before output retry and can recover; repeated failures produce visible Codex app-server copy in group chats; retries are skipped after block/partial/reasoning/tool-result output, compaction notices, queued user persistence, messaging sends, pending messaging sends, completed mutating tools, and pending mutating tools. Android realtime operator connections now request `tool-events`, cache `message` tool visible replies by run id, and submit that visible text when the realtime consult run completes.

What was not tested: live Telegram reproduction of the exact dropped-image session; live Android reinstall/retry of the `ask the time` Talk session; broad Testbox/changed gates; a final clean codex-review verdict after the last side-effect latch, because the last pass was interrupted at operator request after exploratory reads and before it emitted a finding.

## Verification
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/reply-delivery.ts src/auto-reply/reply/reply-delivery.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/reply-delivery.test.ts`
- `ANDROID_HOME=/home/vac/android-sdk ./gradlew :app:testPlayDebugUnitTest --tests ai.openclaw.app.voice.ChatEventTextTest`
- `ANDROID_HOME=/home/vac/android-sdk ./gradlew :app:testThirdPartyDebugUnitTest --tests ai.openclaw.app.voice.ChatEventTextTest`
- `ANDROID_HOME=/home/vac/android-sdk ./gradlew :app:ktlintCheck`
- `git diff --check -- apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/node/ConnectionManager.kt apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/voice/ChatEventText.kt apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/voice/TalkModeManager.kt apps/android/app/src/test/java/ai/openclaw/app/voice/ChatEventTextTest.kt`
- `~/.codex/skills/codex-review/scripts/codex-review --mode local` accepted findings were manually verified and fixed; the last rerun was stopped before a final verdict, with no final actionable finding emitted before termination.

## What was not tested
- Live Telegram/app-server repro using the specific dropped picture session.
- Live Android reinstall/retry of the `ask the time` realtime Talk session.
- Full `pnpm check`/changed lanes or Testbox proof.
- Final clean codex-review closeout after the last mutation-side-effect fix; this PR is intentionally draft for follow-up review/CI.
target.author: vacinc
